message:
fix: correct TLS tests to use slot index not full key ID

The pthread_key_t ID encodes both slot index (lower 10 bits) and
generation counter (upper bits). Three tests were incorrectly
comparing full key IDs or using them as array indices:

- key_delete_slot_reused: now compares slot indices
- key_create_delete_create_reuses_slot_with_new_destructor: same fix
- generation_counter_increments_on_create_and_delete: was using full
  key ID (1024+) as index into 1024-element array, causing OOB panic

Also: derive Default for TlsEntry instead of manual impl (clippy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
